prestazioni: AMG M120 7.3L V12 (M297) engine bored to 7.5L with forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by HWA AG for 850+ HP on 100-octane fuel, paired with a bespoke Pagani-tuned ECU (Motec M190) with individual cylinder trims and a 12,000 RPM redline

Titanium exhaust system by Capristo with 102mm quad outlets, 304 stainless steel headers, and a secondary bypass valve for unrestricted flow, reducing backpressure by 42% while retaining the signature Zonda wail at 6,000 RPM

Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the Zonda’s carbon-tub chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by Pagani’s in-house suspension team, paired with uniball control arms from VAC Motorsports for sub-2mm deflection at 1.5G cornering
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Novitec Torado, featuring extended front fenders with integrated LED turn signals, rear quarter panels with functional air extractors, and a 3-piece carbon rear diffuser with Gurney flaps for -28% lift at 200 km/h

Custom titanium bolt-on hardtop by Pagani Composite Research, weighing 18.7 kg (vs. 24 kg stock), with a removable Targa panel and integrated roll hoops clad in Alcantara with exposed carbon weave, finished in a matte ‘Viola Micalizzato’ with hand-painted gold leaf pinstripes

Brembo GT-R 6-piston monobloc calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear) with 410mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (CCMR) by Surface Transforms, featuring directional vane cooling and titanium retention pins, paired with Pagani-branded titanium lug nuts and center-lock adapters by Dymag for a 1.2 kg per wheel reduction
